scenario: Duplicate charging notifications appear when one earbud is worn and the other is placed in an open, unplugged charging case.
description_clean: Repeat charging notifications appear when one earbud is worn and the other is placed in the open, unplugged charging case. Expected behavior is only one charging notification since only one earbud is charging.
steps: Take one earbud and wear it in your ear.
Take the other earbud and place it in the open, unplugged charging case.
Observe the charging notifications that appear on the device.
expected: Only one charging notification should appear, since only one earbud is charging.
